title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.220 - Resignations, how accepted
text:
65.220.  Resignations, how accepted. — The township board may, at any legally convened meeting, for a good and sufficient cause shown to them, accept the written, dated, and signed resignation of any township officer; provided, that in all cases where the action of the township board is required, as provided in section 65.210, a majority of the members concurring therein shall be taken as the action of the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 13964, A.L. 2005 H.B. 58) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12287; 1919 § 13200; 1909 § 11688
